title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate embeddings, list models, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers (via ollama-browser).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models into LangChain LLM & embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Simple interactive CLI wrapper for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copplet code-completion service.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with async & streaming support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Streamlit app for retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack: Ollama + Open WebUI + GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama (generator & embedder nodes).

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, vision, fine-tune, LangGraph, etc.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat, generate code, or refactor via Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt bot that answers questions using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth & rate limits to Ollama API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete & note Q&A via Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama API with tokio & serde.

title: ollama-grafana
summary: Grafana datasource plugin to visualize Ollama metrics (tokens/sec, latency).

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot streaming responses from Ollama with slash commands.
